questionText: Explain which listing requirements or other methodologies you have used to provide reserves data in 7.37. If your organization cannot provide data due to legal restrictions on reporting reserves figures in certain countries/areas, please explain this.
questionKo: 7.37에서 매장량 데이터를 제공하는 데 사용한 상장 요건 또는 기타 방법론을 설명하십시오. 법적 제한으로 매장량 데이터를 제공할 수 없는 경우 그 이유를 설명하십시오.
simpleHelp: The intention of this question is to highlight any limitations on the comparability of data that may be due to different methodologies being used.

guidance.text:
General 
There are a variety of listing requirements or other methodologies available which you may use to aid in providing reserves data. 
Please give the name of listing requirements or other methodologies or give a description of an in-house methodology or a combination of in-house and published methodologies used to provide reserves data in 7.37. 
Please provide a description of the listing requirements, methodology or methodologies that you have used to provide reserves data in 7.37. 
CDP makes no judgments on the listing requirements or other methodologies applied by companies and it is not the intention to seek any proprietary information on how to estimate reserves. 
If your organization cannot provide data due to legal restrictions on reporting reserves figures in certain countries/areas, please explain this.
guidance.textKo: 일반 There are a variety of 상장 요건 또는 기타 방법론 available which you may use to aid in providing 매장량 데이터. Please give the name of 상장 요건 또는 기타 방법론 또는 give a description of an in-house 방법론 또는 a combination of in-house 및 published methodologies used to provide 매장량 데이터 in 7.37. Please provide a description 의 상장 요건, 방법론 또는 methodologies that you have used to provide 매장량 데이터 in 7.37. CDP makes no judgments on the 상장 요건 또는 기타 방법론 applied by companies 및 it is not the intention to seek 하나 이상 proprietary information on how to estimate reserves. 만약 귀사 cannot provide data due to 법적 제한 on reporting reserves figures in certain countries/areas, please explain this.

criteria.criteria:
Text answer provided - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Text answer 입력 - 2 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.
